title: Implement a feature from a short SPEC.md
prompt: Read SPEC.md and implement the missing `src/rate_limit.js` module so all tests pass. Do not modify SPEC.md or the tests. Use file_view to read the spec and tests before writing code.

projectFiles.SPEC.md:
# Rate limiter

Implement `createRateLimiter({ limit, windowMs })` in `src/rate_limit.js`.

## API

```js
const rl = createRateLimiter({ limit: 3, windowMs: 1000 });
rl.allow("user-1"); // boolean
rl.remaining("user-1"); // number of remaining tokens in current window
rl.reset("user-1"); // clears that key
```

## Rules
- Each key starts with `limit` tokens.
- `allow(key)` consumes one token if available and returns true; otherwise false.
- Tokens refill to `limit` when `windowMs` has elapsed since the window start for that key.
- Windows are per-key and start on the first `allow` after a refill/reset.
- Pure in-memory; no timers required beyond `Date.now()`.
